title: Hearts and Spangles
writer: Norman Houston, James J. Tynan, Henry McCarty
actors: Wanda Hawley, Robert Gordon, Barbara Tennant
plot: Steve Carris, a medical student, is expelled from college, disowned by his father and joins a circus. He makes friends with Peg Palmer, and makes an enemy of Barclay, who has a yen for Peg himself. Steve works as a clown when old ...
